title: CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: STEWART BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTER CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Referral and coordination of substance use treatment services through Intensive Care Coordination. Child outpatient services work with children presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focuses on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high-need children). 1002 Library Court Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger. Some programs serve up to age 25. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm Email (503) 722-6950 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 722-6950 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and referral FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. State General Fund for individuals who are uninsured. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STEWART BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTER
